Metadata.SourceFile: Yogi Bear and Friends in the Greed Monster.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0890 "YOGIBEARANDFRIENDSINTHEGREEDMONSTER-0890" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Yogi Bear and Friends in the Greed Monster.prg"
